title: Certain code causes error in OPT_CLEAN pass
body:
Synthesizing this kind of module 
```
module muller(ind, alpha, outd, dither);
input[3:0] ind;
input[3:0] alpha;
output[3:0] outd;
input dither;

reg outd;

always @( * ) begin : pask
	reg[6:0] roppe1;
	reg[6:0] roppe2;

	roppe1 = ({4'b0000,ind[2:0]} * {3'b000,alpha}) + 4;
	roppe2 = ({4'b0000,ind[2:0]} * {3'b000,alpha}) + 12;

	if (dither)
		outd = {ind[3],roppe1[6:4]};
	else
		outd = {ind[3],roppe2[6:4]};
end
endmodule

```
with
```
read -sv muller.v
synth -lut 3 -top muller
```

causes
```
2.21.8. Executing OPT_CLEAN pass (remove unused cells and wires).
Finding unused cells or wires in module \muller..
Removed 0 unused cells and 4 unused wires.
<suppressed ~1 debug messages>
ERROR: Found error in internal cell \muller.$auto$alumacc.cc:485:replace_alu$12 ($alu) at kernel/rtlil.cc:973:
  attribute \src "muller.v:16.11-16.52"
  cell $alu $auto$alumacc.cc:485:replace_alu$12
    parameter \A_SIGNED 0
    parameter \A_WIDTH 2
    parameter \B_SIGNED 0
    parameter \B_WIDTH 5
    parameter \Y_WIDTH 5
    connect \A $auto$rtlil.cc:2218:Mux$20
    connect \B $auto$wreduce.cc:454:run$9 [6:2]
    connect \BI 1'0
    connect \CI 1'0
    connect \CO $auto$opt_share.cc:248:merge_operators$22
    connect \X $auto$opt_share.cc:247:merge_operators$21
    connect \Y $auto$opt_share.cc:219:merge_operators$18
  end
```

This issue can be worked around by doing
```
	if (dither)
		roppe1 = roppe2;

	outd = {ind[3],roppe1[6:4]};

```

git commit b0004911ca15ec41db56c76c83461061fedc742e
